title: the Hollowed
description: Adds Random Events And The Hollowed
body:
In this horror-themed Minecraft mod, The Hollowed lurks deep in the shadows of your world. At any moment without warning there's a chance the air will grow still, the sky will dim... and he will be summoned.

[Host your servers on Bisecthosting!](https://www.bisecthosting.com/clients/aff.php?aff=7287)
